article_translations_publication_tuple_c.name: article_translations_publication_tuple_check
article_translations_publication_tuple_c.value:
(
          ("article_translations"."status" = 'draft' and "article_translations"."scheduled_at" is null and "article_translations"."published_at" is null)
          or ("article_translations"."status" = 'scheduled' and "article_translations"."scheduled_at" is not null and "article_translations"."published_at" is null)
          or ("article_translations"."status" = 'published' and "article_translations"."published_at" is not null)
        )

content_reviews_decision_tuple_check.name: content_reviews_decision_tuple_check
content_reviews_decision_tuple_check.value:
(
        ("content_reviews"."decision" = 'pending' and "content_reviews"."reviewer_id" is null and "content_reviews"."decided_at" is null)
        or ("content_reviews"."decision" = 'approved' and "content_reviews"."reviewer_id" is not null and "content_reviews"."decided_at" is not null)
        or ("content_reviews"."decision" = 'changes_requested' and "content_reviews"."reviewer_id" is not null and "content_reviews"."decided_at" is not null and "content_reviews"."reason" is not null and length(trim("content_reviews"."reason")) > 0)
      )

preview_snapshots_schedule_claim_check.name: preview_snapshots_schedule_claim_check
preview_snapshots_schedule_claim_check.value: ("preview_snapshots"."schedule_claimed_at" is null and "preview_snapshots"."schedule_claimed_by" is null) or ("preview_snapshots"."schedule_claimed_at" is not null and "preview_snapshots"."schedule_claimed_by" is not null)

preview_snapshots_schedule_before_expiry.name: preview_snapshots_schedule_before_expiry_check
preview_snapshots_schedule_before_expiry.value: "preview_snapshots"."scheduled_at" is null or "preview_snapshots"."expires_at" is null or "preview_snapshots"."scheduled_at" < "preview_snapshots"."expires_at"
